title: ohmyclaude Skill Frontmatter Schema
description: Canonical schema for SKILL.md YAML frontmatter in ohmyclaude skills

name.description: Skill identifier. MUST match the parent directory name exactly (folder name is canonical).

description.description: Describes what the skill provides and when it activates. Include trigger keywords for auto-activating skills. General engineering skills should be concise (under 200 chars). Pipeline artifact and mechanics skills may be longer to accurately describe their pipeline role, agent relationships, and trigger conditions.

origin.description: Plugin that owns this skill. Always 'ohmyclaude' for first-party skills.

trigger.description: 'keyword' (default) — skill auto-activates when trigger phrases appear in the user's message. 'explicit' — skill only activates when directly invoked by name. Use 'explicit' for destructive or manual-only operations.

license.description: SPDX license identifier. Optional. Defaults to the plugin's MIT license if omitted.

examples.name: api-design
examples.description: REST and GraphQL API design — resource naming, versioning, error responses, pagination. Triggers on 'design API', 'REST endpoint', 'GraphQL schema'.

examples.name: reducing-entropy
examples.description: Manual-only skill for minimizing total codebase size. Only activate when explicitly requested.
